# Copilot Instructions for the-stuffy-council

Canonical guidance is in [../AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). Read it first.

Repo-wide agent policy (audience, review protocol, style) is in
[./instructions/agent-authoring.instructions.md](instructions/agent-authoring.instructions.md).

This file is a Copilot-specific pointer for builds that pre-date native
`AGENTS.md` support. Do not add rules or skill listings here — they belong
in `AGENTS.md` or in `.github/instructions/**`.
